+    "description": "Bug: Rust fails to build surrealdb. This issue affects 6+ users.",
+    "type": "troubleshoot",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify surrealdb troubleshoot symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your surrealdb installation:\n```bash\nsurreal version\nsurreal is-ready\n```\nLook for errors or warnings that may indicate the issue."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review surrealdb configuration",
+        "description": "Review the relevant surrealdb configuration:\n### Describe the bug\n\ncargo build fails with this message:\n```\n   Compiling rocksdb v0.21.0\n   Compiling surrealdb-core v2.0.0-1.5.0\n   Compiling surrealdb-core v1.4.2\n   Compiling surrealdb v1.5.0\nerror[E0599]: no method named"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Bug: Rust fails to build surrealdb",
+        "description": "Thank you for submitting this pull request! We really appreciate you spending the time to work on these changes.\n\n## What is the motivation?\n## What does this change do?\n\nFixes the issue\n\n## What is your testing strategy?\n\nTwo micro test project linking with the lib (with and without `sql2`) have\n```yaml\nCompiling rocksdb v0.21.0\n   Compiling surrealdb-core v2.0.0-1.5.0\n   Compiling surrealdb-core v1.4.2\n   Compiling surrealdb v1.5.0\nerror[E0599]: no method named `with_temporary_directory` found for struct `Datastore` in the current scope\n   --> /home/miladamery/.cargo/registry/src/index.crates.io-6f17d22bba15001f/surrealdb-1.5.0/src/api/engine/local/native.rs:156:17\n    |\n156 |         let kvs = kvs.with_temporary_directory(address.config.temporary_directory);\n    |\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm Bug: Rust fails to build surrealdb is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:\nTest surrealdb to confirm the issue is resolved.\nConfirm that the issue symptoms are gone."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Thank you for submitting this pull request! We really appreciate you spending the time to work on these changes.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "Compiling rocksdb v0.21.0\n   Compiling surrealdb-core v2.0.0-1.5.0\n   Compiling surrealdb-core v1.4.2\n   Compiling surrealdb v1.5.0\nerror[E0599]: no method named `with_temporary_directory` found for struct `Datastore` in the current scope\n   --> /home/miladamery/.cargo/registry/src/index.crates.io-6f17d22bba15001f/surrealdb-1.5.0/src/api/engine/local/native.rs:156:17\n    |\n156 |         let kvs = kvs.with_temporary_directory(address.config.temporary_directory);\n    |",
+        "[dependencies]\nsurrealdb = {version = \"1.5.0\", features = [\"kv-rocksdb\"]}\nserde = {version = \"1.0.201\", features = [\"derive\"]}\ntokio = {version = \"1.37.0\", features = [\"full\"]}",
+        "#[tokio::main]\nasync fn main() -> surrealdb::Result<()> {\n    let db = Surreal::new::<RocksDb>(\"/home/miladamery/Pictures/ds\")\n        .await?;\n\n    Ok(())\n}"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
